headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Iron Mountain, Raises Price Target to $143
summary: Barclays  analyst Brendan Lynch   maintains Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $127 to $143.

headline: Iron Mountain (IRM) Is Down 5.1% After Issuing 6.250% Senior Notes - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In late June 2026, Iron Mountain completed a private offering of US$1.50 billion of 6.250% Senior Notes due 2035, primarily to refinance revolving credit facility borrowings and for general corporate purposes. This unsecured, senior, and initially US-subsidiary-guaranteed debt adds long-term funding flexibility while embedding covenants that could influence future capital allocation and balance sheet management. Next, we’ll examine how Iron Mountain’s new 6.250% Senior Notes financing may...
